user.title: Select entities
user.description: Choose the existing entities the load balancer should use. Any manufacturer works as long as these entities exist.

data_description.grid_power_entity: Sensor measuring instantaneous imported grid power (W or kW).
data_description.charger_power_entity: Sensor measuring the EV charger power (W or kW).
data_description.charging_status_entity: Entity that is ON while the vehicle is charging.
data_description.charging_current_entity: Number entity that sets the charging current in Amps.

electrical.title: Electrical parameters
electrical.description: Describe your electrical installation and the limits the controller must respect.

data_description.target_power: The controller keeps total imported grid power at or below this value.
data_description.emergency_power: Above this value the current is reduced immediately, bypassing the regular controller.
data_description.voltage: Nominal phase voltage of your installation.
data_description.phases: Whether the charger is connected single phase or three phase.
data_description.min_current: The charging current is never set below this value.
data_description.max_current: The charging current is never set above this value.

control.title: Controller tuning
control.description: Fine tune how the proportional controller behaves. The defaults work well for most installations.

data_description.update_interval: How often the controller evaluates the situation.
data_description.deadband: While the averaged grid power is within this band around the target, no changes are made.
data_description.max_step: The current is never changed by more than this amount in a single cycle.
data_description.gain: Proportional gain. Lower values react more gently, higher values more aggressively.
data_description.average_window: Length of the moving average applied to the grid power.
data_description.response_timeout: After writing a new current, wait at most this long for the charger power to react.
data_description.min_change_interval: Minimum time that must pass between two consecutive current changes.
data_description.emergency_reduction: How many Amps to shed immediately when the emergency threshold is exceeded.
data_description.current_step: Resolution the computed current is rounded to before writing (most chargers accept whole Amps).

error.emergency_below_target: Emergency power must be greater than the target power.
error.max_below_min: Maximum current must be greater than the minimum current.

abort.already_configured: A load balancer for this charging current entity is already configured.

invalid_entry_id.message: No EV Dynamic Load Balancer config entry found with id {entry_id}.

entry_not_loaded.message: The config entry {entry_id} is not loaded.

no_entries_loaded.message: No EV Dynamic Load Balancer instances are currently loaded.
